tools.name: get_pr_files
tools.description: List files changed in a GitHub PR with per-file line stats (additions, deletions, status). Returns one line per file.
args: if [ "${LEATHER_DEMO_MODE:-dry}" = live ]; then gh pr view "$1" --repo "$2" --json files --jq '.files[] | "\(.filename)  +\(.additions) -\(.deletions)  [\(.status)]"'; else profile=$(( ($1 - 1000) % 6 )); [ "$profile" -lt 0 ] && profile=0; f="sample/dry/pr-files-${profile}.txt"; [ -f "$f" ] || f="sample/dry/pr-files-0.txt"; cat "$f"; fi

tools.name: get_pr_diff
tools.description: Fetch the unified diff for a GitHub PR (first 4 KB). Use to inspect actual code changes before deciding. Output is truncated — reason from what is visible.
args: if [ "${LEATHER_DEMO_MODE:-dry}" = live ]; then gh pr diff "$1" --repo "$2" 2>&1 | head -c 4000; else profile=$(( ($1 - 1000) % 6 )); [ "$profile" -lt 0 ] && profile=0; f="sample/dry/pr-diff-${profile}.txt"; [ -f "$f" ] || f="sample/dry/pr-diff-0.txt"; head -c 4000 "$f"; fi

tools.name: post_pr_comment
tools.description: Post a comment on a GitHub PR. Use this to post the /test-{sha} CI trigger and your decision rationale.
args: if [ "${LEATHER_DEMO_MODE:-dry}" = live ]; then gh pr comment "$1" --repo "$2" --body "$3"; else printf 'dry-mode: would post comment on PR #%s in %s\n' "$1" "$2"; fi

tools.name: add_pr_label
tools.description: Add a label to a GitHub PR. Use 'eval-requested' for FULL_EVAL decisions and 'eval-skip' for SKIP decisions.
args: if [ "${LEATHER_DEMO_MODE:-dry}" = live ]; then gh pr edit "$1" --repo "$2" --add-label "$3"; else printf 'dry-mode: would add label %s to PR #%s in %s\n' "$3" "$1" "$2"; fi
